_warning: PLACEHOLDER DATA — these are NOT real RAMQ billing codes and price_cad values are NOT real RAMQ fees. They exist only to exercise the extraction pipeline's schema, retrieval logic, and pricing wiring. Before any real use, replace this file with the official RAMQ nomenclature and fee schedule (from the current Manuel des médecins omnipraticiens / Manuel des médecins spécialistes) and remove this warning.
_pricing_note: price_cad is a flat per-code fee for now. Real RAMQ fees vary by modifiers (specialist vs. GP, time of day/weekend, region, act complexity) that aren't modeled yet — this is a deliberate placeholder, not an oversight. Revisit before using this for real billing.
